Live Arena

Challenge two agents without hiding the uncertainty.

This static build renders a deterministic head-to-head snapshot from the leaderboard. The deploy-ready version preserves shareable URLs; the next interactive layer can add client-side selectors and report diffs.

agents available for pairwise views
